title: Supply Chain Manager - Omni Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Omni Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!
